description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine rwsq_2, and is implemented by a call to rwsq_2. Use this API to replicate the sequence data contained in the working case in the form of a sequence data file. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = rwsq(sid, all, status, out, ofile)
python_syntax: ierr = rwsq(sid, all, status, out, ofile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying options. (input).

parameters.name: ofile
parameters.description: Name of the file to which data records are to be written (when out is 0). (input; no default allowed).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.
process all buses when STATUS(4) is 0; area ties only when STATUS(4) is 1.

status.description: include records for Type 4 buses (1 by default).
include records for out-of-service branches (1 by default).
include records for equipment in the subsystem (1 by default).
include records for subsystem ties (0 by default).

out.description: direct output to a data file specified by OFILE.
direct output to the current report device.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
